meaning: n.鍙ゅ反(鐢卞彜宸村矝鍙婂叾涓磋繎璇稿皬宀涚粍鎴愮殑鍥藉,棣栭兘涓哄搱鐡﹂偅)
examples: He flew a small plane to Cuba.
He'd love to shoot his film in Cuba.
She is known to hold strong views on Cuba.
That placed us just behind Dominica and Costa Rica, and just ahead of Slovenia and Cuba.
Lombardi said the Pope believes religious freedom in Cuba means more than the ability to worship freely.
